title: First Singularity Party: Olympia, the Spirit Limit Festival
overview: As more and more Servants join Chaldea, maintaining resources for so many is becoming a problem. And so, a cruel order has been given...

title: Second Singularity Party: Kabukicho, a Singularity of Night
overview: Jeanne d’Arc Alter needs a serious amount of QP because of reasons, so she heads to the Kabukicho Singularity, the glittering gem of the nightlife scene, where she begins working at CLUB M. There, she hopes to become the best in town! However, she must first contend with a slew of troublesome customers, as well as the Four Elite hosts.

title: Documentary Exposing Servants Inequality -The Servant Labor Law-
overview: Increased waiting time, level that does not rise... The harsh reality raises dissatisfaction. But there was one servant who stood up to correct this inequality...

title: Max Bond Channel
overview: Ereshkigal feels Master is a little distant from her these days. Dumuzid, shows up and suggests she needs to improve her appeal with ... "ServantTube"!? Can Ereshkigal attract the attention of Master by becoming a popular streamer?
